metadata.description: Semantic UI Registry — platform-independent element definitions with purpose, data contract, and interaction model.

_schema_notes.core_fields: id, name, purpose, category, data_contract, interactions, children, implementations, used_by, tags — these are the hard structural fields required for correctness.
_schema_notes.category_1_optional_enrichment: state (observable state flags, Record<string, 'boolean'|'string'|'number'>), flows (ordered workflow descriptions), error_states (known error/edge-case states with condition, behavior, severity), rendering_capabilities (input modalities like touch, mouse, keyboard, voice).
_schema_notes.category_2_derivable_metadata: is_async (boolean, whether async operations are involved), default_action (primary action when invoked), visibility_conditions (conditions controlling when element is shown).
_schema_notes.design_principle: New fields enrich interpretation but never become mandatory for correctness. All Category 1 and 2 fields are optional.
